EXHIBIT RECEIPT - PLAINTIFF

LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC SHALL PAY DEFENDANT ROBIN APPLEWOOD REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $7,300.00 WITHIN 30 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO FEES UNDER CIV. CODE SEC. 1717, AS PLAINTIFF SUED DEFENDANT IN ORDER TO RECOVER MONEY OWED PURSUANT TO A CONTRACT DEFENDANT ENTERED INTO WITH WELLS FARGO, PLAINTIFF'S ASSIGNOR. (SEE DECLARATION OF MARK T. CLAUSEN, EX. 1.) COURT AWARDS AN ADDITIONAL $300.00 IN COSTS FOR A TOTAL AWARD OF $7,600.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR #5976: DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

EXHIBIT RECEIPT - DEFENDANT

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT ROBIN APPLEWOOD'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 16, 2014 TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 24, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Dec-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Atty. KAREN LUSIS of Midland Credit Management, Tel No. (858) 560-2600 appearing telephonically for the Plaintiff;
Atty. MARK CLAUSEN, Tel No. (707) 542-9700 appearing for the Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court modified its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: DEFENDANT ROBIN APPLEWOOD'S Motion For Attorney's Fees is GRANTED. Plaintiff Midland Funding, LLC shall pay Defendant Robin Applewood reasonable attorney's fees in the amount of $7,300.00 within 30 days of entry of this order. Defendant is entitled to fees under Civ. Code sec. 1717, as Plaintiff sued Defendant in order to recover money owed pursuant to a contract Defendant entered into with Wells Fargo, Plaintiff's assignor. (See Declaration of Mark T. Clausen, Ex. 1.) Court awards an additional $300.00 in costs for a total award of $7,600.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Nov-24-2014 Continued To Dec-16-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT ROBIN APPLEWOOD'S Motion For Attorney'S Fees is continued to December 16, 2014 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than November 24, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/ehg
